meaning: adj.内窥镜的,内窥镜检查的
examples: All of the swallowed objects were later recovered with endoscopic surgery.
Endoscopic resection of giant colorectal polyps is feasible and safe.
Objective: To discuss gastrointestinal polyp typing and endoscopic therapy for " small polyp" .
It is hoped it could allow gastrointestinal problems to be diagnosed without the need for uncomfortable endoscopic exams.
In a similar vein, as it were, endoscopic surgery is becoming increasingly popular.
